focus_area: AI for Cybersecurity / AI-Native Security Infrastructure

They understand that AI is both the greatest threat and the greatest defense in cybersecurity. Lior Simon's background building defensive systems for Israeli intelligence gives him unique insight into AI-driven attack vectors.

Deep understanding of nation-state attack patterns

outreach_strategy.differentiation: Security systems that learn and adapt to AI-generated attacks in real-time
outreach_strategy.recommended_subject: AI that thinks like Unit 8200 — for enterprise defense

packets.notes: Top priority — Cyberstarts is THE cybersecurity VC with unmatched operator expertise
